requirement_topic.en: KC Mark — Electrical Safety Certification (KC 62368-1 / Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act)
requirement_topic.zh: KC认证——电气安全认证（KC 62368-1 / 《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》）
requirement_topic.zht: KC認證——電氣安全認證（KC 62368-1 / 《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》）

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices with an external power supply or mains connection placed on the South Korean market must comply with electrical safety requirements under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법), administered by KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards) under MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy). The applicable Korean safety standard for audio/video, information technology, and communication technology equipment — the category that covers most consumer IoT and wireless devices — is KC IEC 62368-1 (Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment), which adopts IEC 62368-1 with Korean national deviations. Certification (KC safety mark) must be obtained from a KATS-accredited conformity assessment body (KTC, KTL, KOTITI, UL Korea, or equivalent) before the product is placed on the market. The KC safety mark is integrated into the unified KC Mark that also covers radio and EMC, so for radio equipment, safety testing is typically coordinated with the NRRA KC radio certification process. The KC certification number (covering safety, EMC, and radio) appears once on the label. Mains-powered IoT hubs, smart home devices, and devices with AC/DC adapters are within scope; battery-operated low-voltage devices not connected to the mains may be exempt from the safety certification requirement but should be assessed against the product category list under the Electrical Appliances Act.
summary.zh: 向韩国市场投放的带有外部电源或主电源连接的无线及物联网设备，须符合产业通商资源部（MOTIE）下属韩国产品安全协会（KATS）管理的《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》（전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법）规定的电气安全要求。覆盖大多数消费类物联网及无线设备的音视频、信息技术及通信技术设备的适用韩国安全标准为KC IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备安全要求），该标准以IEC 62368-1为基础，附带韩国国家偏差。产品上市前须从KATS认可合格评定机构（KTC、KTL、KOTITI、UL Korea等）取得KC安全认证（KC安全标志）。KC安全标志已纳入同时涵盖无线电及EMC的统一KC标志，因此对于无线电设备，安全测试通常与NRRA KC无线电认证程序协调进行。KC认证编号（涵盖安全、EMC和无线电）在标签上仅出现一次。主电源供电的物联网中枢、智能家居设备及带AC/DC适配器的设备均在适用范围内；不连接主电源的电池供电低压设备可能豁免于安全认证要求，但应对照《电气用品法》下的产品类别清单进行评估。
summary.zht: 向韓國市場投放的帶有外部電源或主電源連接的無線及物聯網裝置，須符合產業通商資源部（MOTIE）下屬韓國產品安全協會（KATS）管理的《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》（전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법）規定的電氣安全要求。覆蓋大多數消費類物聯網及無線裝置的音視頻、信息技術及通信技術設備的適用韓國安全標準為KC IEC 62368-1（音視頻、信息及通信技術設備安全要求），該標準以IEC 62368-1為基礎，附帶韓國國家偏差。產品上市前須從KATS認可合格評定機構（KTC、KTL、KOTITI、UL Korea等）取得KC安全認證（KC安全標誌）。KC安全標誌已納入同時涵蓋無線電及EMC的統一KC標誌，因此對於無線電設備，安全測試通常與NRRA KC無線電認證程序協調進行。KC認證編號（涵蓋安全、EMC和無線電）在標籤上僅出現一次。主電源供電的物聯網中樞、智能家居設備及帶AC/DC適配器的設備均在適用範圍內；不連接主電源的電池供電低壓設備可能豁免於安全認證要求，但應對照《電氣用品法》下的產品類別清單進行評估。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — electrical safety KC certification (KATS / MOTIE)
KC IEC 62368-1 — Safety requirements for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment (Korean adoption of IEC 62368-1 with national deviations)
KC Mark Unified Certification Scheme — safety, EMC, and radio consolidated under single KC number on product label

summary.en: China requires CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for electrical safety of listed consumer electronic and IT products under the Catalogue of Products Subject to China Compulsory Certification, administered by CNCA. The applicable Chinese safety standard for IT and audio/video equipment is GB 4943.1 (Information technology equipment — Safety — Part 1: General requirements), adopting IEC 60950-1 with Chinese national deviations. China is transitioning to GB 4943.1 aligned with IEC 62368-1; transition timelines should be verified with CNCA. CCC safety certification involves testing by a CNAS-accredited CNCA-designated laboratory. Chinese CCC safety certificates do not satisfy Korean KC electrical safety requirements; separate KC safety certification to KC IEC 62368-1 is mandatory.
summary.zh: 中国依据CNCA管理的《强制认证产品目录》，要求对目录内消费类电子及IT产品的电气安全进行CCC（中国强制认证）认证。IT及音视频设备的适用中国安全标准为GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全——第1部分：通用要求），采用IEC 60950-1附带中国国家偏差；中国正在向与IEC 62368-1对应的GB 4943.1过渡，过渡时间表须向CNCA确认。CCC安全认证须通过CNCA指定的CNAS认可实验室进行测试。中国CCC安全证书不满足韩国KC电气安全要求；须单独进行KC IEC 62368-1电气安全认证。
summary.zht: 中國依據CNCA管理的《強制認證產品目錄》，要求對目錄內消費類電子及IT產品的電氣安全進行CCC（中國強制認證）認證。IT及音視頻設備的適用中國安全標準為GB 4943.1（信息技術設備安全——第1部分：通用要求），採用IEC 60950-1附帶中國國家偏差；中國正在向與IEC 62368-1對應的GB 4943.1過渡，過渡時間表須向CNCA確認。CCC安全認證須通過CNCA指定的CNAS認可實驗室進行測試。中國CCC安全證書不滿足韓國KC電氣安全要求；須單獨進行KC IEC 62368-1電氣安全認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment: Safety — Part 1: General requirements (SAC/MIIT, adopts IEC 60950-1 with Chinese national deviations; transition to IEC 62368-1 alignment in progress)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety for in-scope IT and consumer electronics (CNCA / CNAS-accredited labs)

gap.en: Chinese GB 4943.1 / CCC electrical safety certificates do not satisfy South Korean KC IEC 62368-1 safety requirements. Key gaps: (1) KC IEC 62368-1 adopts IEC 62368-1 with Korean national deviations, which differ from both Chinese GB 4943.1 (IEC 60950-1 based) and IEC 62368-1 without deviations — specific Korean constructional and performance differences must be confirmed with the KC-accredited test lab; (2) CCC certificates from Chinese CNCA-designated labs are not accepted — testing must be conducted by a KATS-accredited KC body (KTC, KTL, KOTITI, UL Korea); (3) IEC 62368-1 CBScheme test reports (from CB Scheme member countries) may be eligible for recognition under Korea's participation in CB Scheme, potentially reducing re-testing scope — manufacturers should confirm CB Scheme applicability with their chosen KC lab before conducting full repeat tests; (4) a common compliance gap: manufacturers with CCC safety approval assume no additional safety certification is needed — the KC safety mark is separately mandatory in Korea. For the power adapter/charger supplied with a wireless device, a separate KC safety certification for the adapter may also be required if the adapter is marketed or sold independently.
gap.zh: 中国GB 4943.1 / CCC电气安全证书不满足韩国KC IEC 62368-1安全要求。主要差距：（1）KC IEC 62368-1采用附带韩国国家偏差的IEC 62368-1，与中国GB 4943.1（基于IEC 60950-1）及无偏差的IEC 62368-1均存在差异——须与KC认可测试实验室确认特定韩国结构和性能差异；（2）不接受来自中国CNCA指定实验室的CCC证书——测试须由KATS认可的KC机构（KTC、KTL、KOTITI、UL Korea）进行；（3）来自CB体系成员国的IEC 62368-1 CB体系测试报告，在韩国参与CB体系的框架下可能获得认可，从而减少重新测试范围——制造商在进行完整重复测试前，应与所选KC实验室确认CB体系的适用性；（4）常见合规差距：持有CCC安全认证的制造商误以为无需额外安全认证——韩国KC安全标志须单独取得。如果随无线设备提供的电源适配器/充电器单独销售，还可能需要为该适配器单独取得KC安全认证。
gap.zht: 中國GB 4943.1 / CCC電氣安全證書不滿足韓國KC IEC 62368-1安全要求。主要差距：（1）KC IEC 62368-1採用附帶韓國國家偏差的IEC 62368-1，與中國GB 4943.1（基於IEC 60950-1）及無偏差的IEC 62368-1均存在差異——須與KC認可測試實驗室確認特定韓國結構和性能差異；（2）不接受來自中國CNCA指定實驗室的CCC證書——測試須由KATS認可的KC機構（KTC、KTL、KOTITI、UL Korea）進行；（3）來自CB體系成員國的IEC 62368-1 CB體系測試報告，在韓國參與CB體系的框架下可能獲得認可，從而減少重新測試範圍——製造商在進行完整重複測試前，應與所選KC實驗室確認CB體系的適用性；（4）常見合規差距：持有CCC安全認證的製造商誤以為無需額外安全認證——韓國KC安全標誌須單獨取得。如果隨無線裝置提供的電源適配器/充電器單獨銷售，還可能需要為該適配器單獨取得KC安全認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KC safety certification to KC IEC 62368-1 required for mains-connected and externally powered wireless / IoT consumer devices before South Korea market entry under Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (KATS / MOTIE)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC-scope products) — GB 4943.1 CCC electrical safety certification required under CNCA Catalogue for listed IT and consumer electronics categories

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS) — Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KC electrical safety certification to KC IEC 62368-1 is mandatory for mains-powered and externally powered consumer wireless and IoT devices before South Korea market entry. Chinese GB 4943.1 / CCC safety certification is not equivalent. Testing must be conducted by a KATS-accredited KC conformity assessment body. CB Scheme reports (IEC 62368-1) may reduce re-testing scope — confirm applicability with the KC lab before committing to full repeat testing. The KC safety mark is consolidated into the unified KC Mark with radio and EMC under a single KC certification number on the product label.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 主电源供电或外部供电的消费类无线及物联网设备进入韩国市场前，须强制取得KC IEC 62368-1电气安全认证。中国GB 4943.1 / CCC安全认证不具同等效力。须由KATS认可的KC合格评定机构进行测试。CB体系报告（IEC 62368-1）可能减少重新测试范围——在进行完整重复测试前，须与KC实验室确认适用性。KC安全标志已整合入统一KC标志，与无线电及EMC共用产品标签上的单一KC认证编号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 主電源供電或外部供電的消費類無線及物聯網裝置進入韓國市場前，須強制取得KC IEC 62368-1電氣安全認證。中國GB 4943.1 / CCC安全認證不具同等效力。須由KATS認可的KC合格評定機構進行測試。CB體系報告（IEC 62368-1）可能減少重新測試範圍——在進行完整重複測試前，須與KC實驗室確認適用性。KC安全標誌已整合入統一KC標誌，與無線電及EMC共用產品標籤上的單一KC認證編號。
